narrative:
Fairport Harbor Ex Vill Sd (Lake) exempted village school district has 2,040 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.2 percentage points.
